title: Carmen C81274BLK Men’s Signature Hair Trimmer with Precision Wheel, 20 Cutting Lengths, Cordless Operation, Black
features: STAINLESS STEEL PRECISION BLADE: Crafted from high quality stainless steel for long-lasting sharpness, the blades combine superior performance and durability for cutting performance and a pristine finish every time

COMPLETE PRECISION: Enjoy complete control and create the perfect customised style in no time; the precision wheel provides 20 length options from 1-20mm and can be easily adjusted for ultimate versatility for face and body grooming

CORDLESS OPERATION: The advanced, rechargeable battery provides up to 90 minutes of cordless runtime from a single charge for a great shave without restrictions; simply pop in the included Type C USB Charging cable to recharge
SNAG-FREE TRIMMING: Smooth cut combs effortlessly glide through hair with rounded tips and follow the contours of your face for a comfortable and smooth shave without tugging
3 YEAR GUARANTEE: Professional Carmen quality with a 1 year guarantee and optional 2 year extension, subject to product registration online
description: Create a professional quality cut at home with the Carmen Signature Men’s Cordless Hair Trimmer. Features 20 cutting lengths from 1-20mm to suit every style, providing ultimate versatility for face and body grooming and the settings can be easily adjusted via the precision dial for convenient use. The advanced, rechargeable battery provides up to 90 minutes of cordless runtime, for a great shave without restrictions. The superior performance stainless steel blade provides long-lasting sharpness for a pristine finish every time, whilst it can easily be rinsed under the tap to keep the shaver in immaculate condition. Its ergonomic and slim design is the perfect fit for your hand so you can comfortably and efficiently trim your face or body.
